title: Amigo 1700 "Halli Galli" Cardgame
features: The idea of Halli Galli is as genius as it is simple
description: From the manufacturer AMIGO Halli Galli On the bell - ready - go! Here we have the salad! A great fruit cocktail with bananas, strawberries, limes and plums - that's Halli Galli. Speed and a good eye are trump cards here. As soon as players discover five identical fruits on the played cards, they quickly hit the bell. But only with exactly five fruits, so watch out! Whoever has "ringed" the most cards at the end has won. Contents * 56 cards * 1 bell * 1 game instructions (English language not At a glance 2-6 players, ages 6 and up Duration: approx. 15 minutes Great fun for young and old Relies on responsiveness and speed and also trains a quick eye The Halli Galli range has been delighting families, friends and player rounds for 30 years How to play Halli Galli (short rule): * Divide all cards evenly among you. * Recover the top of your cards again and again so that an open pile is created in front of you. * As soon as the same fruit is seen on all open stacks, everyone must hit the bell as soon as possible. * Whoever rings right first gets all the stacks revealed as a win. * If you ring wrong, you must hand one card to everyone else for punishment. * Those who run out of cards continue to play until their own discard pile has been lost. * If only two people are left in the game, the bell will ring and distribute the cards one last time. * Won who has the most cards at the end of the game. Halli Galli Twist Halli Galli Extreme Halli Galli Woozle Goozle Halli Galli Junior Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 158 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 38 4.7 out of 5 stars 8,541 Price £19.87 £ 19 . 87 — no data — no data — no data On the bell - done - twist! Halli Galli Extreme - For those who like it wild! With Woozle Goozle on the bell - done! Great fun with funny clowns! Amigo Game + Leisure | Simply Good Games The Hessian game publisher Amigo Spiel + Freizeit GmbH has been distributing products for families and game lovers since 1980. With top sellers like Halli Galli, Wizard, 6 takes! or Bohnanza, it is one of the largest German game publishers. In 1998, Amigo received the award "Game of the Year" for the family game Elfenland. In 2017, ICECOOL received the award "Children's Game of the Year", the card game Lama was nominated for Game of the Year in 2019 and in 2022 was awarded the coveted prize with Zauberberg again. In addition to the publisher's own board games, AMIGO also has a large portfolio of licensed and distribution products and has been selling the Pokémon trading card game exclusively in Germany and Austria since 1999. Amigo stands for quality, high-quality products, durability and confidence.
